zh.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne是Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale和nn unknown的兒子，於大約1195年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯維安維沃。他於1218年與Mabel Malet在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1241年在英國薩默塞特被列為sheriff of somerset。他去世於1249年10月16日之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne was born about 1195, in Vivonne, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France as the son of Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale and nn unknown. He married Mabel Malet in 1218, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1241, at the age of 47, his occupation is listed as sheriff of somerset in Somerset, England. He died before 16 October 1249, in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne est né environ 1195, à Vivonne, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, France, fils de Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale et nn unknown. Il a épousé Mabel Malet en 1218, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1241, à l’âge de 47 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of somerset à Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 16 octobre 1249, à Wells, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne wurde um 1195 in Vivonne, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich, als Sohn von Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale und nn unknown geboren. Er hat 1218 in Chewton, Somerset, England Mabel Malet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1241, als er 47 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of somerset in Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 16. Oktober 1249 in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne è nato il circa 1195 nel Vivonne, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia come figlio di Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale e nn unknown. Lui sposato Mabel Malet nel 1218, nel Chewton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1241, all'età di 47 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of somerset nel Somerset, England. Morì prima del 16 ottobre 1249, nel Wells, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonneは約1195年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツヴィエンヴィボンでComte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumaleとnn unknownの息子として生まれた。1218年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでMabel Maletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1241年，47歳の時，イギリスソメルセトでの職業はsheriff of somersetと記録されている。彼は1249年10月16日以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエルズで死去した。

ko.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: 영국 노르폴크 웰스 니스트 테 시
ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne(은)는 대략 1195년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 비니 비본에서 Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale(와)과 nn unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1218년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Mabel Malet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1241년, 47세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트에서 sheriff of somerset이었다. 그는 1249년 10월 16일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰스에서 사망했다.

pt.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne nasceu aproximadamente 1195, em Vivonne, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, França filho de Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale e nn unknown. Ele casou-se com Mabel Malet em 1218, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1241, com 47 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of somerset em Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 16 de outubro de 1249, em Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England

ru.Wells next the Sea, Norfolk, England: веллс некст т сеа, норфолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne родился около 1195 г. в местности вивонн, виенн, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция. Его родителей звали Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale и nn unknown. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Malet в 1218 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1241 году, в возрасте 47 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of somerset в местности сомирсет, Англия. Он умер перед 16 октябрь 1249 г. в местности веллс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh de Vivonne nació aproximadamente 1195, en Vivonne, Vienne, Poitou-Charentes, Francia como hijo de Comte Guillaume de Forz I d'Aumale y nn unknown. Se casó con Mabel Malet en 1218, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1241, a la edad de 47 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of somerset en Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 16 de octubre de 1249, en Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
